violations.description: Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Condensation pipe in walk in cooler drains into a bucket. It needs to drain into a permanent floor drain.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floors throughout have cracked tiles.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood system needs to be cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Areas of the main kitchen floor have cracked or missing tiles. Walk-in cooler also has missing tiles.
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
